vocab.meaning: cực kỳ hạnh phúc, sung sướng
vocab.example: I was absolutely over the moon when my parents surprised me with a designer watch on my graduation day.

vocab.word: know someone or something inside out
vocab.meaning: hiểu rõ tận tường, hiểu chân tơ kẽ tóc
vocab.example: My best friend knows my style inside out, so the watch she gifted me was absolutely perfect.

vocab.word: be worth its weight in gold
vocab.meaning: vô cùng hữu ích hoặc có giá trị lớn
vocab.example: To me, that watch is worth its weight in gold because of the sentimental memories attached to it.

vocab.meaning: là cả thế giới, có ý nghĩa cực kỳ quan trọng với ai đó
vocab.example: That vintage timepiece was my grandfather's, so receiving it as a gift meant the world to me.

vocab.meaning: đúng cái đang cần, hoàn toàn phù hợp
vocab.example: I had been looking for a minimalist watch for months, and this gift really hit the spot.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó vô cùng ngạc nhiên hoặc phấn khích
vocab.example: The sheer elegance of the watch they gave me totally blew my mind when I opened the box.
I hope to pass this watch down to my own children somewhere further down the line.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi, nắm bắt thông tin (thời gian)
vocab.example: Before I got this watch as a gift, I found it quite difficult to keep track of time during long exams.

vocab.meaning: một điều gì đó mới mẻ và thú vị
vocab.example: Receiving a classic analog watch was a breath of fresh air after years of using only digital gadgets.

vocab.meaning: vừa khít, rất phù hợp (về kích cỡ hoặc tính chất)
vocab.example: The watch strap was easily adjustable and it fits my wrist like a glove.
